name: recallfox
description: Push what you learn into recallfox, your spaced-repetition retention layer.

interface.shortDescription: Turn what you learn into spaced-repetition cards
interface.longDescription: Create decks and cards in recallfox from any conversation. Spaced repetition resurfaces them over time so the knowledge sticks.
defaultPrompt: Turn what we just covered into cards
Make cloze cards for these key terms
